prompts_dict.EmotionClassification: Classify the emotion expressed in the given text into: joy, sadness, surprise, fear, anger, and love.
prompts_dict.FEVER: Given a claim, retrieve documents that support or refute the claim.
prompts_dict.HotpotQA: Given a multi-hop question, retrieve passages that answer the question.
prompts_dict.MedrxivClusteringP2P: Identify the main category of medRxiv papers based on the titles and abstracts.
prompts_dict.MedrxivClusteringS2S: Identify the main category of medRxiv papers based on the titles.
prompts_dict.QuoraRetrieval: Retrieve questions that are semantically equivalent to the given one.
prompts_dict.RedditClustering: Identify the topic or theme of Reddit posts based on the titles.
prompts_dict.RedditClusteringP2P: Identify the topic or theme of Reddit posts based on the titles and posts.
prompts_dict.SciDocsRR: Given a title of a scientific paper, retrieve the titles of other relevant papers.
prompts_dict.StackExchangeClustering: Identify the topic or theme of StackExchange posts based on the titles.
prompts_dict.StackExchangeClusteringP2P: Identify the topic or theme of StackExchange posts based on the given paragraphs.
prompts_dict.StackOverflowDupQuestions: Retrieve duplicate questions from StackOverflow forum.
prompts_dict.SummEval: Given a news summary, retrieve other semantically similar summaries.
prompts_dict.Touche2020: Given a question, retrieve detailed and persuasive arguments that answer the question.
prompts_dict.TwentyNewsgroupsClustering: Identify the topic or theme of the given news articles.
